# cloudfoundry_space_quota (List Resource)

This list resource allows you to discover all space quotas within an organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# This feature requires Terraform v1.14.0 or later (Stable as of 2026)
# List resources must be defined in .tfquery.hcl files.

# Generic template for a list block
list "cloudfoundry_space_quota" "<label_name>" {
  # (Required) Provider instance to use
  provider = provider_name

  config {
    # Provider specific filters
  }
}


# List block to discover all space quotas within an organization.
list "cloudfoundry_space_quota" "within_org" {
  provider = cloudfoundry

  config {
    # Required
    org = "ca721b24-e24d-4171-83e1-1ef6bd836b38"
  }
}

# List block to discover all space quotas within an organization and include the resource data in the output.
list "cloudfoundry_space_quota" "with_include_resource" {
  provider         = cloudfoundry
  include_resource = true

  config {
    # Required
    org = "ca721b24-e24d-4171-83e1-1ef6bd836b38"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org` (String) The GUID of the organization to list space quotas for.
